ArtifactLocation.description: One immutable frame artifact reachable through S3.

CaptureInvocationVersion.description: Version of the Lambda invocation contract.

FrameArtifactId.description:
Deterministic identity of one frame-artifact capture contract.

This identifies the immutable visual inputs and locked capture environment,
not the encoded PNG payload. Deployments use it to choose an object key;
the artifact's internal checksum still verifies the published bytes.

Publication.description: Whether this invocation committed a new object or reused a verified one.

oneOf.description: This invocation conditionally committed a new immutable artifact.
A concurrent or prior invocation had already committed the same artifact.

description: Structured result of one frame-capture invocation.
title: CaptureResult
